item.description: President Donald Trump is vowing retaliation against Iran, saying he is considering a “massive attack” after Houthi rebels struck two Saudi oil tankers in the Red Sea. The attack pushed international oil prices above $100 a barrel for the first time since May. NBC’s Richard Engel reports and Meet the Press moderator Kristen Welker joins TODAY with political analysis.

media:content.media:title: Trump Vows Retaliation Against Iran for Houthi Attack in Red Sea
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump is vowing retaliation against Iran, saying he is considering a “massive attack” after Houthi rebels struck two Saudi oil tankers in the Red Sea. The attack pushed international oil prices above $100 a barrel for the first time since May. NBC’s Richard Engel reports and Meet the Press moderator Kristen Welker joins TODAY with political analysis.

item.title: Trump Vows Retaliation Against Iran for Houthi Attack in Red Sea

item.dc:creator: Sahil Kapur
Kyle Stewart
Frank Thorp V
item.description: The House approved a nonbinding proposal to end the Iran war, directing President Donald Trump to remove armed forces from hostilities.

media:content.media:text: Donald Trump salutes as members of a U.S. Army carry team move the flag-draped transfer case
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump on Wednesday salutes the flag-draped transfer case holding the remains of Army Pvt. Isabella Gonzales, who was killed in the war with Iran.

item.title: House votes to end Iran war, but Senate Republicans vote to let Trump continue waging it

item.dc:creator: Erika Edwards
item.description: The massive, multistate outbreak of cyclosporiasis has expanded to nine states, the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention said Friday.

media:content.media:text: Iceberg Lettuce Boxed and Loaded on Truck
media:content.media:description: The outbreak of cyclosporiasis has been tied to iceberg lettuce.

item.title: Cyclosporiasis outbreak expands to 9 states

item.description: President Trump announced new 10% to 12.5% tariffs on 60 countries over accusations of "forced labor." Those new duties will take effect at 12:01 a.m. ET on Friday morning.

media:content.media:title: President Trump announces new tariffs on dozens of countries
media:content.media:description: President Trump announced new 10% to 12.5% tariffs on 60 countries over accusations of "forced labor." Those new duties will take effect at 12:01 a.m. ET on Friday morning.

item.title: President Trump announces new tariffs on dozens of countries

item.description: Authorities have now identified the man who was shot to death by a police officer in Madison, Wisconsi, during an attempted arrest that was captured on multiple videos. It comes as protesters are demanding answers and an investigation gets underway. Warning: Some of the video is disturbing. NBC’s Shaquille Brewster reports for TODAY.

media:content.media:title: Outrage Boils Over in Fatal Police Shooting of Man in Wisconsin
media:content.media:description: Authorities have now identified the man who was shot to death by a police officer in Madison, Wisconsi, during an attempted arrest that was captured on multiple videos. It comes as protesters are demanding answers and an investigation gets underway. Warning: Some of the video is disturbing. NBC’s Shaquille Brewster reports for TODAY.

item.title: Outrage Boils Over in Fatal Police Shooting of Man in Wisconsin

item.dc:creator: Mithil Aggarwal
item.description: An activist has ended his 26-day hunger strike that galvanized India’s “Cockroach” protests, turning them into one of the biggest challenges to the government.

media:content.media:text: India Cockroach Protests
media:content.media:description: The Cockroach Janta Party's ongoing protest movement in New Delhi on Friday.

media:content.media:text: Leaders of India's youth-led "Cockroach" movement said they would meet the government on July 24 after Prime Minister Narendra Modi pledged legal reforms and swift punishment for those involved in exam paper leaks.
media:content.media:description: The Cockroach Janta Party's ongoing protest movement in New Delhi on Friday.

media:content.media:text: Leaders of India's youth-led "Cockroach" movement said they would meet the government on July 24 after Prime Minister Narendra Modi pledged legal reforms and swift punishment for those involved in exam paper leaks.
media:content.media:description: The Cockroach Janta Party's ongoing protest movement in New Delhi on Friday.

media:content.media:text: India Cockroach Party
media:content.media:description: The Cockroach Janta Party's ongoing protest movement in New Delhi on Friday.

item.title: ‘Cockroach’ protests spread across India as leading activist ends hunger strike

item.description: The Trump administration imposed 50% tariffs on three categories of imports from Canada, dairy, alcohol, and cars, citing discriminatory actions. NBC News' Monica Alba reports on how Trump is also considering additional tariffs due to the Canadian wildfires.

media:content.media:title: Trump imposes 50% tariffs on dairy, alcohol, and cars from Canada
media:content.media:description: The Trump administration imposed 50% tariffs on three categories of imports from Canada, dairy, alcohol, and cars, citing discriminatory actions. NBC News' Monica Alba reports on how Trump is also considering additional tariffs due to the Canadian wildfires.

item.title: Trump imposes 50% tariffs on dairy, alcohol, and cars from Canada

item.dc:creator: Erika Edwards
item.description: The massive, multistate outbreak of cyclosporiasis has expanded to nine states, the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention said Friday.

media:content.media:text: Iceberg Lettuce Boxed and Loaded on Truck
media:content.media:description: The outbreak of cyclosporiasis has been tied to iceberg lettuce.

item.title: Cyclosporiasis outbreak expands to 9 states

item.dc:creator: Mithil Aggarwal
item.description: An activist has ended his 26-day hunger strike that galvanized India’s “Cockroach” protests, turning them into one of the biggest challenges to the government.

media:content.media:text: India Cockroach Protests

item.dc:creator: Richard Engel
Chantal Da Silva
Matthew Mulligan
item.description: The United States launched a fresh barrage of strikes on Iran overnight as President Donald Trump threatened a major new escalation after Tehran opened a second front in its pressure campaign on the world economy.

media:content.media:text: Smoke rises from an explosion at an unknown location, during what the U.S. Central Command (CENTCOM) says are strikes on Iranian military targets, in this screengrab taken from a handout video released on July 23, 2026.
media:content.media:description: Smoke rises from an explosion at an unknown location, during what the U.S. Central Command (CENTCOM) says are strikes on Iranian military targets, in this screengrab taken from a handout video released on July 23, 2026.

media:content.media:text: Satellite Imagery Of The Bab el-Mandeb Strait
media:content.media:description: Satellite imagery of the Bab el Mandeb strait

media:content.media:text: A boat is targeted during U.S. strikes on Iranian military targets, in this screengrab taken from a Central Command video released Thursday.
media:content.media:description: A boat is targeted during U.S. strikes on Iranian military targets, in this screengrab taken from a Central Command video released Thursday.

item.title: U.S. launches new strikes and Trump threatens ‘massive attack’ as Iran widens war

item.dc:creator: Ashley Morris
item.description: Finding a self-tanner for dark skin depends on your undertone — find the best options from Isle of Paradise, Tan-Luxe, Jergens and more.

media:content.media:text: Self-tanners can work for all skin tones, however choosing the right shade is key for a good match and a natural-looking tan.
media:content.media:description: Self-tanners can work for all skin tones, however choosing the right shade is key for a good match and a natural-looking tan.

media:content.media:text: Self-tanners can work for all skin tones, however choosing the right shade is key for a good match and a natural-looking tan.
media:content.media:description: Self-tanners can work for all skin tones, however choosing the right shade is key for a good match and a natural-looking tan.

item.title: The best self-tanners for dark skin in 2026

item.dc:creator: Zoe Malin
Cory Fernandez
item.description: We found the best dorm essentials to get this year, including bedding, organizers, decor, tech, supplies and much more.

media:content.media:text: You can get some of the best dorm essentials at great prices from Amazon, Target, Walmart and more.
media:content.media:description: You can get some of the best dorm essentials at great prices from Amazon, Target, Walmart and more.

media:content.media:text: You can get some of the best dorm essentials at great prices from Amazon, Target, Walmart and more.
media:content.media:description: You can get some of the best dorm essentials at great prices from Amazon, Target, Walmart and more.

item.title: The 33 best dorm essentials to make the school year go smoothly — at least as your room is concerned

item.dc:creator: Bethany Heitman
item.description: Deodorant concealer can temporarily hide dark underarms, but dermatologists warn that it may irritate skin or mask deeper issues. Here’s what to know before you try it.

media:content.media:text: A few brands have released tinted deodorant aka deodorant concealer to help even out the skin tone in your armpits.
media:content.media:description: A few brands have released tinted deodorant aka deodorant concealer to help even out the skin tone in your armpits.

media:content.media:text: A few brands have released tinted deodorant aka deodorant concealer to help even out the skin tone in your armpits.
media:content.media:description: A few brands have released tinted deodorant aka deodorant concealer to help even out the skin tone in your armpits.

item.title: What is deodorant concealer and is the viral product safe? Derms weigh in

item.dc:creator: Bethany Heitman
item.description: Walmart has the Dyson V8 Absolute Cordless Vacuum marked down to just under $300 — a rare discount on a Dyson vacuum. Here’s why shoppers love it.

media:content.media:text: The Dyson V8 Absolute is cordless, tackles pet hair and is lightweight.
media:content.media:description: The Dyson V8 Absolute is cordless, tackles pet hair and is lightweight.

media:content.media:text: The Dyson V8 Absolute is cordless, tackles pet hair and is lightweight.
media:content.media:description: The Dyson V8 Absolute is cordless, tackles pet hair and is lightweight.

item.title: This popular Dyson vacuum is $290 off at Walmart right now — get it before the price goes back up

item.dc:creator: Phil Helsel
Rebecca Cohen
item.description: The stabbings occurred about a block apart in Manhattan’s Upper West Side, law enforcement sources said.

media:content.media:text: NYPD van near the corner of West 84th Street and Central Park West.
media:content.media:description: NYPD officers work at the scene after a man was stabbed near Upper West Side near Central Park West in New York City on July 23, 2026.

item.title: NYPD investigating Central Park stabbing as a potential hate crime

item.dc:creator: Adam Reiss
Alexandra Marquez
item.description: A judge repeatedly questioned why prosecutors had issued the subpoenas before pursuing alternative investigative steps.

media:content.media:text: Front of the The New York Times building in New York City.
media:content.media:description: The Justice Department subpoenaed four New York Times reporters after they reported on security concerns with the new Air Force One.

item.title: DOJ agrees to withdraw subpoenas of New York Times journalists over Air Force One reporting

item.description: President Donald Trump is gearing up to attend the rescheduled White House Correspondents Dinner Friday night, after the initial event back in April was targeted by a gunman. The Secret Service says it’s confident in the security plan for the dinner while also acknowledging an alarming rise in threats. NBC’s Garrett Haake reports for TODAY.

media:content.media:title: White House Correspondents’ Dinner Returns Under High Security
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump is gearing up to attend the rescheduled White House Correspondents Dinner Friday night, after the initial event back in April was targeted by a gunman. The Secret Service says it’s confident in the security plan for the dinner while also acknowledging an alarming rise in threats. NBC’s Garrett Haake reports for TODAY.

item.title: White House Correspondents’ Dinner Returns Under High Security
